// @ts-ignore TS6133 import { expect, test } from "vitest"; import * as z from "zod/v3"; import { util } from "../helpers/util.js"; test("check any inference", () => { const t1 = z.any(); t1.optional(); t1.nullable(); type t1 = z.infer<typeof t1>; util.assertEqual<t1, any>(true); }); test("check unknown inference", () => { const t1 = z.unknown(); t1.optional(); t1.nullable(); type t1 = z.infer<typeof t1>; util.assertEqual<t1, unknown>(true); }); test("check never inference", () => { const t1 = z.never(); expect(() => t1.parse(undefined)).toThrow(); expect(() => t1.parse("asdf")).toThrow(); expect(() => t1.parse(null)).toThrow(); });
